service.name: Claude Haiku 4.5 (Fast/Cheap)
service.description_for_ai: Anthropic fastest and cheapest Claude model. Best for high-volume classification, extraction, summarization, simple Q&A. Near-instant responses. Use when speed and cost matter more than maximum capability.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Anthropic fastest and cheapest Claude model. Best for high-volume classification, extraction, summarization, simple Q&A. Near-instant responses. Use when speed and cost matter more than maximum capability. Fast text classification, routing, extraction at low cost. Use for labeling, intent detection, sentiment at scale.

model.description: AI/ML model identifier to use for this request

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in response

agent_hints.vs_sonnet: Use Haiku for: classification, routing, short extraction, simple Q&A. Use Sonnet for: complex reasoning, long documents, coding.
agent_hints.speed: Haiku responds in ~0.5s vs ~2s for Sonnet. Great for real-time applications.
